hero.title: Serving Memorable Dining Experiences Since 2011
hero.subtitle: Walk in Woods is one of Dehradun's trusted family dining destinations, offering delicious food, warm hospitality, and a comfortable atmosphere for families, friends, and special gatherings.

about.title: A Dehradun Dining Tradition Since 2011
about.body: For over a decade, Walk in Woods has welcomed guests with great food, attentive service, and a comfortable dining experience. Whether it's a family dinner, a celebration, or a casual outing, we strive to make every visit memorable.

features.title: A Dining Experience to Remember
features.intro: Every detail is designed to make your time with us comfortable, elegant, and effortless.

items.title: Family-Friendly Dining
items.desc: Spaces designed for families of all sizes, from intimate dinners to big gatherings.

items.title: Comfortable Seating
items.desc: Plush upholstered seating and thoughtful layouts for a relaxed experience.

items.title: Freshly Prepared Food
items.desc: Every dish is crafted to order using carefully sourced ingredients.

items.title: Ideal for Celebrations
items.desc: Birthdays, anniversaries, and reunions — we make every occasion special.

items.title: Warm Hospitality
items.desc: Attentive service that treats every guest like family.

items.title: Convenient Location
items.desc: Easy to reach, with ample parking, right in the heart of Dehradun.

gallery.title: Moments at Walk in Woods
gallery.intro: A glimpse of our interiors, our food, and the people who make every evening special.

items.alt: Family celebrating together at the restaurant
Intimate booth seating with floral centerpiece

why.title: A Standard of Care You Can Taste
why.intro: Five reasons families across Dehradun choose Walk in Woods for their most important meals.

items.title: Established in 2011
items.desc: Over a decade of consistent quality and hospitality.

items.title: Trusted by Families
items.desc: A name Dehradun families return to, again and again.

items.title: Comfortable Fine Dining
items.desc: Premium without pretension — relaxed and welcoming.

items.title: Perfect for Gatherings
items.desc: Private spaces and group menus for every celebration.

items.name: Priya & Rohit Sharma
items.quote: We've celebrated every anniversary here for the past six years. The food, the service, the warmth — nothing else in Dehradun comes close.

items.name: Anil Mehta
items.quote: From my parents to my kids, three generations of our family love Walk in Woods. It's our default place for everything special.

items.name: Kavita Bansal
items.quote: They turned my mother's 70th into the most beautiful evening. Attentive, generous, and the dessert spread was unforgettable.

reserve.title: Reserve Your Table Today
reserve.subtitle: Join us for an unforgettable dining experience with your family and loved ones.
